texts.full_text: eek theater. The playTullia is a significant work that showcases the Renaissance fascination with ancient Greek culture and its influence on contemporary Italian drama. In this play, Martelli delves into the tragic life of Tullia Minor, a queen who was the daughter of the famed Roman general Lucius Cornelius Sulla.
